result.preview:
"Postgres query exectution error (ProgrammingError): (psycopg2.errors.UndefinedFunction) operator does not exist: text >= date
LINE 9:     AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
                              ^
HINT:  No operator matches the given name and argument types. You might need to add explicit type casts.

[SQL: WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), no_transfer_cases AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(t.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
), handled_case_counts AS (
  SELECT u.agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) AS total_cases_touched
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
    UNION
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%%'
      AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
  ) u
  WHERE u.agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY u.agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) > 1
), aht AS (
  SELECT
    n.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (n.closeddate - n.createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
  FROM no_transfer_cases n
  GROUP BY n.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM aht a
JOIN handled_case_counts h ON h.agent_id = a.agent_id
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;]
(Background on this error at: https://sqlalche.me/e/20/f405)"

args.query:
WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), no_transfer_cases AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(t.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
), handled_case_counts AS (
  SELECT u.agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) AS total_cases_touched
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
    UNION
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
      AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
  ) u
  WHERE u.agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY u.agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) > 1
), aht AS (
  SELECT
    n.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (n.closeddate - n.createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
  FROM no_transfer_cases n
  GROUP BY n.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM aht a
JOIN handled_case_counts h ON h.agent_id = a.agent_id
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

WITH base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS agent_id,
    c.createddate,
    c.closeddate
  FROM "Case" c
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
    AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), no_transfer_cases AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(t.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
), handled_case_counts AS (
  SELECT u.agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) AS total_cases_touched
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c
    WHERE c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
    UNION
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
      AND c.createddate >= DATE '2023-05-02'
      AND c.createddate < DATE '2023-09-02' + INTERVAL '1 day'
  ) u
  WHERE u.agent_id IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY u.agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) > 1
), aht AS (
  SELECT
    n.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (n.closeddate - n.createddate))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
  FROM no_transfer_cases n
  GROUP BY n.agent_id
)

FROM aht a
JOIN handled_case_counts h ON h.agent_id = a.agent_id
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC NULLS LAST
LIMIT 1;

args.query:
WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AS start_ts,
    TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02 23:59:59.999' AS end_ts
), base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS agent_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(c.createddate), '') IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(c.closeddate), '') IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    AND c.createddate::timestamp <= p.end_ts
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), no_transfer_cases AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(t.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
), handled_case_counts AS (
  SELECT u.agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) AS total_cases_touched
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c, params p
    WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(c.createddate), '') IS NOT NULL
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
      AND c.createddate::timestamp <= p.end_ts
    UNION
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    CROSS JOIN params p
    WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
      AND NULLIF(TRIM(c.createddate), '') IS NOT NULL
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
      AND c.createddate::timestamp <= p.end_ts
  ) u
  WHERE u.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(TRIM(u.agent_id), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY u.agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) > 1
), aht AS (
  SELECT
    n.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (n.closed_ts - n.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
  FROM no_transfer_cases n
  GROUP BY n.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM aht a
JOIN handled_case_counts h ON h.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE a.avg_handle_time_seconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;

WITH params AS (
  SELECT
    TIMESTAMP '2023-05-02 00:00:00' AS start_ts,
    TIMESTAMP '2023-09-02 23:59:59.999' AS end_ts
), base AS (
  SELECT
    c.id AS case_id,
    c.ownerid AS agent_id,
    c.createddate::timestamp AS created_ts,
    c.closeddate::timestamp AS closed_ts
  FROM "Case" c, params p
  WHERE c.closeddate IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(c.createddate), '') IS NOT NULL
    AND NULLIF(TRIM(c.closeddate), '') IS NOT NULL
    AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
    AND c.createddate::timestamp <= p.end_ts
), transfers AS (
  SELECT
    ch.caseid__c AS case_id,
    COUNT(*) FILTER (WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%') AS owner_change_cnt
  FROM casehistory__c ch
  GROUP BY ch.caseid__c
), no_transfer_cases AS (
  SELECT b.*
  FROM base b
  LEFT JOIN transfers t ON t.case_id = b.case_id
  WHERE COALESCE(t.owner_change_cnt,0) <= 1
), handled_case_counts AS (
  SELECT u.agent_id, COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) AS total_cases_touched
  FROM (
    SELECT c.ownerid AS agent_id, c.id AS case_id
    FROM "Case" c, params p
    WHERE NULLIF(TRIM(c.createddate), '') IS NOT NULL
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
      AND c.createddate::timestamp <= p.end_ts
    UNION
    SELECT ch.newvalue__c AS agent_id, ch.caseid__c AS case_id
    FROM casehistory__c ch
    JOIN "Case" c ON c.id = ch.caseid__c
    CROSS JOIN params p
    WHERE ch.field__c ILIKE 'Owner%'
      AND NULLIF(TRIM(c.createddate), '') IS NOT NULL
      AND c.createddate::timestamp >= p.start_ts
      AND c.createddate::timestamp <= p.end_ts
  ) u
  WHERE u.agent_id IS NOT NULL AND NULLIF(TRIM(u.agent_id), '') IS NOT NULL
  GROUP BY u.agent_id
  HAVING COUNT(DISTINCT u.case_id) > 1
), aht AS (
  SELECT
    n.agent_id,
    AVG(EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (n.closed_ts - n.created_ts))) AS avg_handle_time_seconds
  FROM no_transfer_cases n
  GROUP BY n.agent_id
)
SELECT a.agent_id
FROM aht a
JOIN handled_case_counts h ON h.agent_id = a.agent_id
WHERE a.avg_handle_time_seconds IS NOT NULL
ORDER BY a.avg_handle_time_seconds ASC
LIMIT 1;
